ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Mar-17-2021 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Jan-20-2021 Continued To Mar-17-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances; Paul Perdue appeared by zoom for Administrator.

Mr. Perdue stated that he has no excuses as to why the documents have not been filed, that he should have the inventory and appraisal on file very soon, that there are no assets and that he should have a final report and account in a week or so. Mr. Perdue also stated that he needs to get a signature from his Client and that his Client is Southern California. Status on close of estate is continued to March 17, 2021 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Kabasares. Not reported.
